hero.title: Full Control
hero.subtitle: Delegate your greenhouse's agronomic management entirely to us. Our specialist works on-site full-time.

items.title: Permanent on-site representative
items.text: A GroveX agronomist works full-time in your greenhouse

items.title: All Premium package elements included
items.text: Plans, reports, unlimited expert support, daily remote monitoring

items.title: Target-driven execution
items.text: Agreed kg/m², first-grade percentage, and quality KPIs as the baseline

items.title: Daily operational decisions
items.text: Irrigation, climate, and intervention decisions executed directly

items.title: International expert feedback loop
items.text: Consultation with Delphy, Andre Kool, and other partners on critical decisions

forWhom.title: Who It's For
forWhom.text: Greenhouse owners with 10+ ha seeking full agronomic performance guarantees.

price.title: Pricing
price.text: A custom proposal is prepared after evaluating site area, target yield, and existing infrastructure.
